name: local-web-video-optimizer
description: Local-first browser UI for inspecting, optimizing, and comparing website videos with FFmpeg.

scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace packages/video-core
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:run: npm run build:packages && npm run test:run --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:packages && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:run && npm run build
